messages.content: Implement the website and benchmark improvements in website/src/App.tsx.

Task #1 completed. Task #2 remains. The environment is blocked because pnpm is unavailable.

The earlier website task is complete. Typecheck passed.

I will confirm publication completed, update both distribution tags, verify registry metadata, then push the matching release commit.

Release report
1. Package metadata
2. Installation verification
3. Commit details
HammaDev 0.1.0-alpha.5 is now fully live on the registry. Both installation routes passed, and the release commit was pushed.
